name: Improper Neutralization of Input Terminators
description: The product does not properly neutralize special characters that function as input terminators (e.g., '.' ending SMTP DATA, null bytes terminating C strings, EOF markers) in user input, allowing attackers to prematurely terminate input processing or inject data after the terminator.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides user-controlled data containing terminator characters that flows to TRANSFORM[protocol_handler] or EXTERNAL[downstream] without a TRANSFORM[terminator_escape] that escapes or encodes characters the downstream component interprets as input terminators
